sections.heading:
Travel Smarter.
Save More. Stress Less.
sections.subheading: Altovia combines AI-powered flight search, real-time price tracking, and points optimization — all in one app. Stop juggling five different tools to plan your next trip.

sections.heading: Why Travelers Switch to Altovia
sections.subheading: Everything other apps do separately — done better, in one place.

items.title: Voice-First Flight Search
items.description: Just say "Find me a cheap business class flight to Paris next month" and Altovia does the work. No more filling out endless forms — search the way you actually think.

items.title: Real-Time Price Tracking
items.description: Set a price alert and forget about it. Altovia monitors hundreds of airlines 24/7 and sends you an instant notification the moment fares drop. Never overpay again.

items.title: Points & Miles Maximizer
items.description: Connect your loyalty programs and credit cards. Altovia automatically finds the best way to redeem your points across all your accounts — cash flights and award flights, side by side.

items.title: Destination Discovery
items.description: Not sure where to go? Browse personalized destination recommendations based on your preferences, budget, and travel style. Discover places you'd never find scrolling through search results.

items.title: Hotels & Activities, Too
items.description: Altovia's AI assistant doesn't stop at flights. Ask about hotels, activities, and local experiences — and get curated options instantly, without switching apps.

items.title: Smart Notifications
items.description: Get alerted for price drops, seat availability changes, and gate updates — all customized to your trips. Stay informed without being overwhelmed.

sections.heading: Real Travelers. Real Savings.
sections.subheading: Here's what people say after switching from other travel apps.

items.quote: I used to use three different apps to book a single trip. With Altovia, I just talk to the AI and it finds flights, tracks the price, and even suggests hotels. I saved $340 on my last trip to Tokyo.
items.author: Jessica M.

items.quote: The points optimizer is a game-changer. I had no idea I had enough miles for a business class seat. Altovia spotted it instantly and showed me exactly how to book it.
items.author: Daniel K.

items.quote: I set a price alert for a flight to Barcelona and forgot about it. Three weeks later I got a notification — fares dropped $180. Booked it in 30 seconds. No other app does this so smoothly.
items.author: Priya S.

sections.heading: Your Next Trip Deserves Better.
sections.description: Download Altovia free. Start your 7-day trial with full access to AI search, price tracking, and points optimization. No credit card required.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.subheading: Everything you need to know about Altovia.

items.question: How is Altovia different from Google Flights or Kayak?
items.answer: Google Flights and Kayak are search engines — you fill out forms and they show results. Altovia is a travel AI: you describe what you want in plain language, it searches, tracks, and optimizes for you. It also handles hotels, activities, and points redemption all in one app.

items.question: Can I really use my points and miles through Altovia?
items.answer: Yes. Altovia lets you connect your frequent flyer accounts and credit cards. It shows cash and award flight options side by side, calculates the best value, and tells you exactly which points to use and how much you'll save.

items.question: How does voice search work?
items.answer: Tap the mic button and speak naturally — "I want to fly business class from New York to London in December, under $2,000." Altovia transcribes it, searches across hundreds of airlines, and shows you the best options instantly. No forms, no filters.

items.question: How accurate are the price alerts?
items.answer: Very. Altovia monitors live flight data around the clock. When we detect a meaningful price drop on a route you're tracking, you get a push notification immediately. You can set your target price and Altovia won't bother you until it's hit.

items.question: Is Altovia free to use?
items.answer: Altovia is free to download with a 7-day free trial of all Pro features. After that, you can continue with a monthly or yearly plan. No credit card is needed to start — just download and go.
